name: remote_sync
description: Optional, manually-triggered synchronization with a remote Git repository.

settings.label: Remote repository URL
settings.description: HTTPS or SSH repository URL. No network request is made while saving settings.

settings.label: Remote name
settings.description: Local Git remote name to create or update for synchronization.

settings.label: Branch
settings.description: Remote branch used for manual pull and push operations.

settings.label: Access token
settings.description: Optional HTTPS bearer token. Leave blank to use SSH credentials or the Git credential helper.

settings.label: Allow push
settings.description: Permit the administrator to push local commits to the configured remote.
